_doc: Hand-painted gradient tokens (G1). Replaces the flat 2-stop Lavender→Teal that was previously implicit in the kit. CSS mirror lives in colors_and_type.css as --gradient-aurora and --gradient-aurora-soft. The grain overlay is implemented as a static SVG turbulence filter applied via the .grain utility — see colors_and_type.css.

aurora._doc: Six-stop linear, 105°. Use as the default brand gradient on logo lines, member avatar placeholders, active-tab glow, onboarding accents, marketing hero. Pair with .grain to get the hand-painted treatment.

stops.doc: Cool mid — neither lavender nor teal

auroraSoft._doc: Same stops at lowered alpha (0.46–0.55). For backdrops behind text and for marketing hero washes.

auroraIntimate._doc: RARE — Rose-tinted variant for intimate/personal surfaces only (solo journal cover, self-only bucket card). Lavender → Rose → back. Never in primary chrome.

grain._doc: Static SVG turbulence overlay. Pairs with any aurora variant to produce the hand-painted feel. Implemented inline in colors_and_type.css as --grain-bg + .grain utility. Frozen in low-sensory mode.

low-sensory._doc: Gradients flatten to Lavender; grain disabled.
